ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action options for the event (e.g., Apply On-site, Apply Online) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the event is held */,
  "fee_kes" REAL /* Fee for the event in Kenyan Shillings */,
  "fee_usd" REAL /* Fee for the event in US Dollars */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the event */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the participant belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the participant registered */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the participant */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the participant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the participant's record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant's record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the participant's record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the participant registered for */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the participant registered for the event */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of application (e.g., On-site, Online) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., Confirmed, Pending, Cancelled) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the registration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the registration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the registration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the registration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount_kes" REAL /* Amount paid in Kenyan Shillings */,
  "amount_usd" REAL /* Amount paid in US Dollars */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the payment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the payment record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the payment record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the location record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the location record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event type record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the event type record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Organizer, Registrant, Admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
